bugs.error_message: NonObservableLocale: Reading locale in a non-observable way in a composable function at ChatMessageTranslation.kt:89
bugs.root_cause: Locale.getDefault() called directly in @Composable function — not observable, no recomposition on locale change
bugs.fix: Replaced Locale.getDefault() with LocalConfiguration.current.locales.getOrNull(0), wrapped in remember(configuration) for recomposition
